title: My humble beginnings
body: One of my earliest memories is my father playing Atari 2600 with me — Pac-Man, Space Invaders, and even E.T.

title: A punker is born
body: Skateboarding, Thrasher Magazine, and punk rock. The Descendents showed me you didn't have to live in a gutter to be punk.

title: Get in the van
body: Toured the U.S. in a punk band, then moved to Frankfurt in 2010 and started bartending.

title: Heja Sverige
body: Moved to Sweden with my partner in 2015 and have been here since.

title: Hello, world!
body: Enrolled in Craft Academy coding bootcamp — frustrating, rewarding, and the start of professional development.

title: Game development
body: Fell into game dev while helping on a website — learned Unreal Engine, MetaHuman, and interactive experiences including in-game live TV experiments.
